sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ هِنْدٌ مَعَ أَبِيهَا لِشِرَاءِ كِتَابٍ جَدِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Hind je otišla s ocem da kupi novu knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: Hind went with her father to buy a new book.

sentences.arabic: دَخَلَا مَكْتَبَةً كَبِيرَةً فِي وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ušli su u veliku knjižaru u centru grada.
sentences.translationEn: They entered a large bookstore in the city center.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتْ هِنْدٌ كِتَابًا عَنِ الْحَيَوَانَاتِ وَأَحَبَّتْهُ.
sentences.translation: Hind je pronašla knjigu o životinjama i svidjela joj se.
sentences.translationEn: Hind found a book about animals and loved it.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَاهُ لَهَا أَبُوهَا وَهِيَ فَرِحَةٌ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Otac joj ga je kupio i ona je bila jako sretna.
sentences.translationEn: Her father bought it for her and she was very happy.
